name: Outrageous Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F. In a medium bowl, beat together the granulated sugar, butter, peanut butter, and vanilla until creamy and well blended. Add flour (quick or regular oats), baking soda, salt, and vanilla extract. Stir in the chocolate chips.
2. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough about 2 inches apart onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
3. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until light golden brown. Allow cookies to cool for 1 minute before removing from the cookie sheet.
VARIATIONS:
Chocolate Chip Bars: Grease a 9x9x2 inch square pan. Prepare the dough as directed, but spread it evenly in the prepared pan. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown. Cut into 2 x 1 inch bars. Makes 36 bars.
